helpful: Per-predictor retrieval_log.json with mode and retrieved_doc_date made forward-cell leakage checks fast and evidence-based
statpack.json exposing the terms[].segments structure directly settled the segment_base_rate question without a corpus round-trip
gaps: The statpack carries no populated per-Term salience-band segments, so segment_base_rate/brier_skill_score cannot be computed for any predictor this run
notes: All three predictions were straightforward to score: forward mode, same dispositive docket entry, same correct disposition. The only judgment calls were reasoning-quality spreads and the omitted segment metrics.
